[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11110101 6
1 01101110 5
2 10001000 2
3 10010101 4
4 10110111 6
5 10010110 4
6 01111000 4
7 11111101 7

01 10 10000010 2
12 21 00000000 a
23 32 01100000 2
34 43 10001000 2 match 2
45 54 00001000 1
56 65 01101000 3
67 76 01101001 4
70 07 10100011 4

02 20 00100000 1
13 31 10010000 2
24 42 00000000 a
35 53 01101000 3
46 64 00001000 1
57 75 01101010 4
60 06 00100001 2
71 17 10010010 3

03 30 10100000 2
14 41 10000000 1
25 52 01100000 2
36 63 01101000 3
47 74 10001000 2 match 2
50 05 00100010 2
61 16 00000000 a
72 27 01100000 2

04 40 10000100 2
15 51 00000010 1
26 62 01100000 2
37 73 11111000 5
